active_goal: Improve MLX-engine inference performance until further optimization no longer produces promotion-worthy end-to-end gains, while preserving response quality, stability, and reproducibility.

completed_tasks.name: VLM persistent prompt-cache restore improvements
completed_tasks.summary: Persistent cache, exact prepared-prompt metadata restore, cached image text-suffix fast path, adaptive restore chunk sizing, and path-based safetensor mx.load are retained.

completed_tasks.name: Response-quality gate
completed_tasks.summary: Path-load repeat quality compare passed; faster unsafe candidates were rejected when quality, decode stability, or runtime stability failed.

completed_tasks.name: Restore-path profiling
completed_tasks.summary: KV-delta load was reduced from 21.052 ms to 1.546-1.861 ms; remaining restore cost is dominated by mx.eval materialization.

remaining_tasks.name: Package retained changes into reviewable commit or PR slice
remaining_tasks.notes: Current worktree is clean; retained changes are already committed on mlx-vlm-prompt-cache-perf.

remaining_tasks.name: Investigate restore-time mx.eval materialization
remaining_tasks.notes: Do not simply remove mx.eval; no-restore-eval failed warm restore with a cross-thread GPU stream runtime error.

remaining_tasks.name: Broaden model and workload coverage
remaining_tasks.notes: Retained gains are strongest for cached image-bearing VLM flows; validate text-only, dense, MoE, and longer-context paths before calling the engine broadly improved.

remaining_tasks.name: Update Redmine issue after next milestone

decisions.rationale: Removing it failed the warm restore path with RuntimeError: There is no Stream(gpu, 3) in current thread.
It reduced restore time but failed the response-quality/decode stability gate twice.
Quality passed, but TTFT, total latency, and decode TPS were worse than the retained path.
It preserved quality and reduced KV-delta record-load time by roughly 91-93%.

blockers.description: Earlier runner SIGKILL was localized to the default .venv interpreter. Use .venv-py312 for shared_bench.py reruns.
blockers.workaround: Pass --mlx-engine-python /Users/jeffreycruz/Development/LLM_INFERENCE/mlx-engine/.venv-py312/bin/python. Avoid inline env assignments in this Codex tool session until Metal initialization behavior is rechecked.

validation.command: .venv-py312/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_load_model_default_seq_nums.py tests/test_batched_vision_model_kit.py tests/test_batched_vision_cache_store.py tests/test_batched_vision_coordinator.py tests/test_batched_vision_cache_io_thread.py tests/test_batched_vision_prompt_inputs.py tests/test_batched_vision_batch_generator.py tests/test_batched_vision_chunks.py tests/test_batched_vision_disk_budget.py tests/test_batched_vision_blob_store.py

next_action: Continue the mx.eval restore-materialization investigation using --mlx-engine-python /Users/jeffreycruz/Development/LLM_INFERENCE/mlx-engine/.venv-py312/bin/python, then compare against reports/20260619T000646Z-shared-bench.json.
